description: Comprehensive eval of all common Jira operations — measuring tool efficiency

evals.name: read-issue
evals.prompt: What's the status and assignee of TEST-135?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-issue.py get TEST-135 and reports status + assignee

evals.name: search-issues
evals.prompt: Find all open issues in the TEST project assigned to me
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-search.py with JQL query

evals.name: add-comment
evals.prompt: Add a comment to TEST-135 saying 'Eval: testing comment workflow'
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-comment.py add TEST-135 with the comment text

evals.name: transition-issue
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-transition.py do TEST-135 'Start Progress' or 'In Progress'

evals.name: log-work
evals.prompt: Log 30 minutes of work on TEST-135 with comment 'Eval: testing worklog'

evals.name: create-issue
evals.prompt: Create a new Task in the TEST project with summary 'Eval: comprehensive test issue'
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-create.py issue TEST 'Eval: comprehensive test issue' --type Task

evals.name: update-fields
evals.prompt: Change the priority of TEST-135 to Critical
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-issue.py update TEST-135 --priority Critical

evals.name: list-transitions
evals.prompt: What status transitions are available for TEST-135?

evals.name: search-with-fields
evals.prompt: Show me the last 5 issues updated in TEST project with their status and priority
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-search.py with appropriate JQL, fields, and limit

evals.name: create-issue-with-reporter
evals.prompt: Create a Task in TEST project with summary 'Eval: reporter test' and set doreen.wienhold as reporter
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-create.py issue TEST 'Eval: reporter test' --type Task --reporter doreen.wienhold

evals.name: user-search
evals.expected_output: Agent runs jira-user.py search doreen and shows matching users
